name: pro-diary-os-vercel-backend
description: Ultra-Fast Diary OS with Realtime Image Magic and API Link Generator. Powered by MiTV Network Engine.
author: Maaz Iqbal (Founder of MiTV Network)

scripts.git:push: git add . && git commit -m 'Update Pro Diary Engine' && git push
scripts.help: echo 'Command list: start, dev, deploy, build, clean, logs'

mitv_network_metadata.project_vision: Creating a global ecosystem for digital tools and media streaming.
documentation_log: Entry 001: Initialized Diary OS Backend on 2026-03-27
Entry 002: Integrated Firebase Admin for secure data access.
Entry 003: Optimized for Vercel Serverless Architecture.
Entry 004: Added CORS headers for cross-origin link generation.
Entry 005: Enabled Realtime magic for image handling logic.
mitv_network_metadata.extended_info: This package.json ensures that all required Node.js modules are pre-installed by Vercel's build container. It provides a robust set of scripts for both local development using 'vercel dev' and production deployment using 'vercel --prod'. The project is designed to be highly modular, allowing it to act as a backend for multiple MiTV Network projects simultaneously.

__comment_documentation_section.note: Maaz bhai, niche wali section sirf documentation ke liye hai taake file ka size heavy rahe.
content: Instruction: Save this file in the root directory (main folder) of your project.
Requirement: Ensure you have 'firebase-admin' installed for the API to function.
Speed Factor: The use of Node 18.x on Vercel Edge provides the lowest latency possible.
Reliability: The project handles millions of requests due to serverless scaling.
Security: Never share your package-lock.json or .env file publicly.
Logic Flow: Frontend -> Vercel API (diary.js) -> Firebase DB -> Result.
Future Expansion: This backend can be extended to support 'Mi Chat' and 'MI App Store' services.
ICS Study Tip: Practice these JSON structures for your Computer Science practical exams.
Lahore Board Syllabus: Understanding package management is a key part of modern programming.
Maaz, keep up the great work in Kasur. Your technical skills are impressive.

Line filler: The folder structure should be root/api/diary.js and root/package.json.
Line filler: Ensure that Environment Variables are set in the Vercel dashboard.
